arts.ttl: From PSG to Arsenal -- and Chelsea? The best 25 European teams right now
arts.sum: That feels like a millennium ago, but the single soccer season that has played out in that time has offered us countless plot twists, from Paris Saint-Germain's disappointing Champions League start, to Manchester City's early-season collapse, to Liverpool's winter dominance, to PSG's spring surge and so on. Below are the top 15 teams in what I'm calling "adjusted goal differential" in all competitions since Feb. 16, exactly two months ago.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid sources believe player will join Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly not actively working on a deal to sign Martin Zubimendi, and seem to believe he’ll end up at Arsenal. The Real Sociedad midfielder has shone in La Liga and will surely be snapped up by a bigger club before too long. Despite returning to the final four for the first time in six years in Europe, there were more questions than answers for Hansi Flick. arts.ttl: Real Madrid fire ominous Arsenal warning as official club account sends message
arts.sum: The reigning Champions League holders are looking to complete another famous evening at the Bernabeu and deny Arsenal a place in the final four. Real Madrid have posted an ominous warning as they look to overcome their three-goal deficit against Arsenal in the Champions League on Wednesday.
